_publications._publicationTitle: Recommendations for assessing appearance concerns related to plexiform and cutaneous neurofibromas in neurofibromatosis 1 clinical trials.

_contextSnippet: The validity of the Appearance Distress scores was supported by moderate correlations (r = .37–.59) with the specific facial appearance ratings and higher correlations between scales within domains
details: Validity supported by moderate correlations (r = .37–.59) with specific facial appearance ratings and higher correlations between scales within domains than with scales in other domains
